name: Camunda Orchestration Cluster API connector
description: Read-only connector that fetches process, decision, user-task, and audit data from the Camunda 8 Orchestration Cluster REST API (v2). Replacement for the deprecated Operate API connector. Issues GET (by key) and POST /search requests only; no state-changing operations.

properties.label: Entity
properties.tooltip: Orchestration Cluster API v2 entity. See the API reference.

properties.label: Operation
properties.tooltip: Search issues a POST to /{entity}/search with filter, sort, and page. Get by key issues a GET to /{entity}/{key}.

properties.label: Operation
properties.tooltip: This entity supports Search only (POST to /{entity}/search).

properties.label: Type
properties.tooltip: SaaS for cloud clusters on *.zeebe.camunda.io; Self-Managed for clusters you host yourself.

properties.label: OAuth token endpoint
properties.tooltip: Token endpoint of your identity provider (e.g. Keycloak, Microsoft Entra ID, Auth0).

properties.label: Base URL
properties.tooltip: Base URL of the Orchestration Cluster REST API. Must end with /v2. Example: http://localhost:8080/v2.

properties.label: Region

pattern.message: Must be a SaaS region (e.g. bru-2), a secret ref {{secrets.NAME}}, or a FEEL expression starting with =

properties.tooltip: SaaS cluster region, e.g. bru-2, dsm-1. Visible in the cluster overview in Console. Accepts {{secrets.NAME}} or a FEEL expression.

properties.label: Cluster ID

pattern.message: Must be a UUID (8-4-4-4-12 hex), a secret ref {{secrets.NAME}}, or a FEEL expression starting with =

properties.tooltip: SaaS cluster ID (UUID). Accepts {{secrets.NAME}} or a FEEL expression. See creating API client credentials.
The OAuth token endpoint (SaaS)

properties.label: Client ID
properties.tooltip: OAuth 2.0 client ID with permission to call the Orchestration Cluster API.

properties.label: Client secret
properties.tooltip: OAuth 2.0 client secret. Use a Camunda secret reference like {{secrets.MY_SECRET}} in production.

properties.label: Audience
properties.tooltip: OAuth audience expected by your identity provider.

properties.label: Scopes
properties.tooltip: Space-separated OAuth 2.0 scopes. Required by some identity providers (e.g. for Microsoft Entra ID use api://<client-id>/.default).
Get by key operation method (GET)
Search operation method (POST)

properties.value: ="https://" + authentication.internal_region + ".zeebe.camunda.io/" + authentication.internal_cluster + "/v2" + input.internal_endpoint + input.internal_operation + (if is defined(input.internal_key) then input.internal_key else "")
=authentication.orchestration_base_url + input.internal_endpoint + input.internal_operation + (if is defined(input.internal_key) then input.internal_key else "")

properties.label: Key / ID

pattern.message: Numeric key, identifier (letters, digits, _ . @ -), or FEEL expression starting with =

properties.tooltip: Entity identifier. Numeric key (processInstanceKey, incidentKey, variableKey, processDefinitionKey, elementInstanceKey, userTaskKey, jobKey, decisionDefinitionKey, decisionRequirementsKey, decisionEvaluationInstanceKey, batchOperationKey, authorizationKey, auditLogKey) or string ID (groupId, roleId, tenantId, mappingRuleId). Path separators (/, ..) and whitespace are not allowed. If you supply a FEEL expression, ensure its result contains none of these; the static pattern blocks them only for non-FEEL input.

properties.label: Filter
properties.tooltip: FEEL expression evaluating to a context with per-entity filter fields. Example: {state: "ACTIVE", processDefinitionId: "order-process"}. See the API reference for fields supported by each entity.

properties.label: Sort
properties.tooltip: List of sort objects. Example: [{field: "startDate", order: "ASC"}]. Order is ASC or DESC.

properties.label: Limit

pattern.message: Must be a positive integer or a FEEL expression starting with =

properties.tooltip: Maximum results per page. Default 100, max 10000 (Orchestration Cluster API v2). Leave empty to omit and use server default. Accepts a FEEL expression.

properties.label: Page after (forward cursor)
properties.tooltip: Forward cursor pagination. Pass the page.endCursor string from the previous response to fetch the next page. Mutually exclusive with Page before and Page from.

properties.label: Page before (backward cursor)
properties.tooltip: Backward cursor pagination. Pass the page.startCursor string from the previous response to fetch the previous page. Mutually exclusive with Page after and Page from.

properties.label: Page from (offset)
properties.tooltip: Offset-based pagination. Zero-based index of the first result. Mutually exclusive with Page after and Page before.

pattern.message: Must be a non-negative integer or a FEEL expression

properties.value: =context merge([if is defined(input.internal_filter) and input.internal_filter != null then {filter: input.internal_filter} else {}, if is defined(input.internal_sort) and input.internal_sort != null then {sort: input.internal_sort} else {}, if ((is defined(input.internal_results) and input.internal_results != null and input.internal_results != "") or (is defined(input.internal_after) and input.internal_after != null and input.internal_after != "") or (is defined(input.internal_before) and input.internal_before != null and input.internal_before != "") or (is defined(input.internal_from) and input.internal_from != null and input.internal_from != "")) then {page: context merge([if is defined(input.internal_after) and input.internal_after != null and input.internal_after != "" then {after: input.internal_after} else {}, if is defined(input.internal_before) and input.internal_before != null and input.internal_before != "" then {before: input.internal_before} else {}, if is defined(input.internal_from) and input.internal_from != null and input.internal_from != "" then {from: (if input.internal_from instance of number then input.internal_from else number(input.internal_from))} else {}, if is defined(input.internal_results) and input.internal_results != null and input.internal_results != "" then {limit: (if input.internal_results instance of number then input.internal_results else number(input.internal_results))} else {}])} else {}])

properties.label: Result variable
properties.tooltip: Name of a process variable to store the full response in. Skip if you only want to map specific fields via Result expression. See result variable docs.

properties.label: Result expression
properties.tooltip: FEEL expression returning a context whose keys become process variables. Example: ={items: response.body.items, total: response.body.page.totalItems}. See result expression docs.

properties.label: Connection timeout

pattern.message: Must be a non-negative integer, a {{secrets.NAME}} reference, or a FEEL expression starting with =

properties.tooltip: Seconds to wait when establishing the TCP connection. 0 disables the timeout (not recommended in production).

properties.label: Error expression
properties.tooltip: FEEL expression that maps connector errors to a BPMN error. Example: =if error.code = "404" then bpmnError("NOT_FOUND", error.message) else null. See BPMN errors docs.

properties.label: Version
properties.tooltip: Version of the element template

properties.label: ID
properties.tooltip: ID of the element template
